units.translation_target_text: 1 Deferred cash awards granted in previous years include the right to receive a nominal return between the date of grant and the actual date of grant. This return is determined with reference to the rate of return specified at the time of grant and is paid annually. The relevant amount is based on the amount already paid.

units.source_text: 滙豐控股有限公司 2025年報及賬⽬
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings plc 2025 Annual Report and Accounts
units.translation_en: HSBC Holdings plc 2025 Annual Report and Accounts

preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 兩名執⾏董事在操守及⾏為⽅⾯均達到所要求的標準，可獲授周年獎
units.translation_target_text: Two executive directors who meet the required standards of conduct and conduct will be awarded the Annual Award
units.translation_en: Two executive directors who meet the required standards of conduct and conduct will be awarded the Annual Award

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Two executive directors who meet the required standards of conduct and conduct will be awarded the Annual Award

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 周年獎勵以50%現⾦及50%股票形式發放。獎勵的股票部分在授出獎勵
units.translation_target_text: Annual awards are issued in the form of 50% cash and 50% stock. The stock portion of the award is awarded when the award is granted
units.translation_en: Annual awards are issued in the form of 50% cash and 50% stock. The stock portion of the award is awarded when the award is granted

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Annual awards are issued in the form of 50% cash and 50% stock. The stock portion of the award is awarded when the award is granted

units.source_text: 之時即時實際授出，並受⼀年禁售期及撤回條款約束。
units.translation_target_text: The shares are actually granted immediately and are subject to a one-year lock-up period and withdrawal terms.
units.translation_en: The shares are actually granted immediately and are subject to a one-year lock-up period and withdrawal terms.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The shares are actually granted immediately and are subject to a one-year lock-up period and withdrawal terms.

units.source_text: 獎勵以基本薪⾦的300%為可得上限，並根據周年評分紀錄結果釐定。
units.translation_target_text: The bonus is capped at 300% of the basic salary and is determined based on annual scoring records.
units.translation_en: The bonus is capped at 300% of the basic salary and is determined based on annual scoring records.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The bonus is capped at 300% of the basic salary and is determined based on annual scoring records.

units.source_text: 評估表現時，委員會已考慮利率的影響，並無就此作出調整，同時再次
units.translation_target_text: When assessing performance, the committee has considered the impact of interest rates and has not made any adjustments.
units.translation_en: When assessing performance, the committee has considered the impact of interest rates and has not made any adjustments.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: When assessing performance, the committee has considered the impact of interest rates and has not made any adjustments.

units.source_text: 確認宏觀經濟環境變化及對業務表現的影響仍需由集團⾏政⼈員管理。
units.translation_target_text: Confirmation of changes in the macroeconomic environment and their impact on business performance remains to be managed by group executives.
units.translation_en: Confirmation of changes in the macroeconomic environment and their impact on business performance remains to be managed by group executives.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Confirmation of changes in the macroeconomic environment and their impact on business performance remains to be managed by group executives.

units.source_text: 委員會審慎考慮實現2025年業績的廣泛相關資料，包括年內為股東實現
units.translation_target_text: The Committee carefully considers a broad range of information relevant to achieving results for 2025, including achieving results for shareholders during the year
units.translation_en: The Committee carefully considers a broad range of information relevant to achieving results for 2025, including achieving results for shareholders during the year

layout_variants.display_en: The Committee carefully considers a broad range of information relevant to achieving results for 2025, including achieving results for shareholders during the year

units.source_text: 強勁總回報。委員會成員認為艾橋智及郭珮瑛的總體評分紀錄結果適當
units.translation_target_text: Strong total returns. Committee members believed that the overall rating record results of Ai Qiaozhi and Guo Peiying were appropriate
